---
title: "Structural Equation modelling"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r Load libraries, echo=FALSE}
library(lavaan)
library(psych)
library(foreign)
library(semPlot)
library(lavaanPlot)
library(dplyr) 
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)
library(mvnormalTest)
```

```{r Load data}
## Load data
data("HolzingerSwineford1939")
head(HolzingerSwineford1939)
```

```{r}
model <- 'visual =~ x1 + x2 + x3 
          textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
          speed =~ x7 + x8 + x9'
model.fit <- cfa(model, data = HolzingerSwineford1939, std.lv = T)
summary(model.fit, fit.measure = T)

```
